_comment: Frozen benchmark topics for the deep-research-survey A/B. Gold references are the repo's OWN completed surveys (the ReportBench 'reverse-engineer the prompt from a gold survey' method). Run each topic through the baseline and improved SKILL.md, N>=3 repeats per arm, same model. Keep this set frozen across runs so deltas are attributable to the skill, not the topics.

models.generator: pin one model across both arms; the only variable is the SKILL.md
models.judge: MUST differ from generator (avoid self-preference bias; see proposal P1-3)

topics.prompt: Use the deep-research-survey skill to produce a rigorous survey on Retrieval-Augmented Generation architectures and tradeoffs (dense vs sparse retrieval, chunking, reranking, fusion-in-decoder vs in-context, eval). First principles to SOTA.
topics.note: The 2026-03 survey whose agent-death incident produced agent-research-strategy.md — natural P0-1 orchestration A/B.

topics.prompt: Use the deep-research-survey skill to produce a rigorous survey on parameter-efficient fine-tuning methods (LoRA, adapters, prefix-tuning, QLoRA, merging, tradeoffs).
Use the deep-research-survey skill to produce a survey/design-review on RLHF and preference optimization (reward modeling, PPO, DPO, RLAIF, reward hacking, eval).
topics.note: Large multi-section topic; stresses cross-section consistency (P1-2).
